Compliance.description: Fully SARB licensed, FSCA registered, registered credit provider, NCA compliant, POPIA compliant, no violations or fines found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 4.2/5 (500+ reviews), Trustpilot 3.7/5 (50+ reviews), Google Maps 3.9/5. App Store 4.7/5 iOS (121K reviews). Praised for no-fee model, easy onboarding.

Product Value.description: Truly fee-free transactional account. Savings products at competitive rates. Business banking competitive. Low cost drives excellent value.

Innovation.description: Digital-first. App-centric. Partnership with Grocer Pick n Pay/Boxer for kiosk onboarding. AI-based credit scoring. TymeX fintech hub.

Customer Support.description: 24/7 chat/email support, in-store kiosks at PnP/Boxer. Mixed reviews on resolution speed.

Accessibility & Security.description: POPIA, PCI-DSS. iOS 4.7/5 (121K). Android 4.4/5 (91K). Multi-factor auth. Biometric login. Branches via kiosk.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Free account. No monthly fee. Some withdrawal fees.

socialSentiment.summary: Positive on HelloPeter/app stores; praised for no-fee model and convenience; minor complaints on support.
